title: Yanbu Heat Wave
lead: Yanbu is experiencing a severe heat wave with a Z-Score of +4.14. The city has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Yanbu has led to extremely high temperatures, with a CDD of 13.5 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 38%, and the wind speed is 15.9 km/h, exacerbating the heat. 
 The HDD is at 0.0 GG, indicating no heating degree days, and the focus is on cooling.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately.
